<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: markdown_single_h1`

## Purpose

Require that the markdown body contains at most one H1 heading.

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: markdown_single_h1
```
